description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GLideN64 that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has three jobs: Linux, Windows, and Release. The Linux job runs on ubuntu-latest and builds GLideN64 for Linux, while the Windows job runs on windows-latest and builds GLideN64 for Windows. The Release job runs on ubuntu-latest, waits for the Linux and Windows jobs to complete, and creates a release with the build artifacts.
